nasb.text: for you have had five husbands, and the one whom you now have is not your husband; this you have said truly.”

esv.text: for you have had five husbands, and the one you now have is not your husband. What you have said is true.”

cnv.text: 你以前有五個丈夫，現在有的並不是你的丈夫；你說這話是真的。”

ccb.text: 因为你已经有过五个丈夫了，现在和你同居的也不是你的丈夫。你说的是实话。”

csbs.text: 其实你已经有过五个丈夫，你现在有的，不是你的丈夫。你说的是真的。”
